instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new LiquidGlass material for a custom card.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 Apple Pencil hover API to highlight a drawing area.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI widget using the new VideoEffects API to show a live video preview.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 SmartStack API to add a hydration reminder widget.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new Sidebar API to show navigation for a movie app.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using RealityKit to display a floating 3D object.

Refactor an ObservableObject with a published String property to @Observable for tvOS26.

Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a weather summary, configurable via AppIntent.

Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a battery percentage, configurable via AppIntent.

Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected object name, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using Live Activities to show a running timer.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 Multitasking API to open two apps side by side.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using Metal 4 to render a custom shader.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 Health API to display heart rate data.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using Continuity Camera to show a live feed from iPhone.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using ARKit to show a detected plane.
